title: Senior SEO Specialist at Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a SEO Specialist for our Mysuru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
